pom.xml.general_idea: Rename the project artifact and name from 'kitchensink' to 'courses' to reflect the new application identity.
Add Spring Data MongoDB starter to enable MongoDB database integration.
Add explicit dependency for javax.validation API, likely to handle namespace changes or explicit needs in newer stacks.
Add Awaitility library to assist with testing asynchronous jobs.
Add explicit Spring Security Config dependency to manage security context in async threads.
Add OpenCSV library for CSV parsing capabilities.
Update JaCoCo coverage exclusion patterns to match the new package structure (courses instead of kitchensink).
Add a JaCoCo check execution to enforce 100% code coverage rules during the build.
Add Pitest Maven plugin for mutation testing with JUnit 5 support.
Add Git Code Format Maven plugin to enforce Google Java Format on commits.
Add Git Commit ID Maven plugin to generate git properties during the build.
Upgrade the Node.js version used by the frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add MONGODB_URI placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add START_QTR placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add END_QTR placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add UCSB_API_KEY placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add COURSE_DATA_STALE_THRESHOLD_MINUTES placeholder to environment configuration sample.
Add CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN placeholder to environment configuration sample for Storybook integration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.
Add frontend/strykerTmp to .gitignore to exclude Stryker mutation testing temporary directory.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Changed the copy strategy to include the entire source directory (including .git) to support build-time git information retrieval.
Set the PRODUCTION environment variable to true to ensure the application runs in production mode.
Updated the Maven build command to use the production profile and skip tests during the Docker image build.

README.md.general_idea: Rename the project from 'demo-spring-react-kitchensink' to 'proj-courses' and update the description to reflect the CMPSC 156 legacy code project.
README.md.human_impl: Changed title to '# proj-courses' and updated intro text to describe 'Courses Search'.

README.md.general_idea: Replace old Storybook and Heroku deployment links with new Dokku production and QA URLs for the current and previous semester teams.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced Storybook links with tables of Dokku URLs for prod/qa and w24 teams.

README.md.general_idea: Simplify local setup instructions by referencing a dedicated OAuth documentation file instead of inline steps.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced inline Google Client ID setup steps with a link to `docs/oauth.md`.

README.md.general_idea: Clarify the steps for running the backend and frontend separately on localhost, including troubleshooting tips.
README.md.human_impl: Updated 'Getting Started on localhost' section with clearer terminal commands and error handling advice.

README.md.general_idea: Add specific instructions for deploying and configuring the application on Dokku, including environment variables.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Getting Started on Dokku' section with `dokku config:set` commands.

README.md.general_idea: Document how to access the Swagger UI for API endpoints.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Accessing swagger' section with the localhost URL.

README.md.general_idea: Document how to access the H2 database console on localhost and Dokku.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Accessing Database Console' section with links and references.

README.md.general_idea: Document how to run partial and full Pitest mutation coverage tests.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Partial pitest runs' section with `mvn pitest:mutationCoverage` examples.

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image tag to reflect a change in project identity or purpose.

frontend/.eslintrc.json.general_idea: Added 'react-app/jest' to the extends array to enable Jest-specific linting rules provided by Create React App.
Disabled the 'testing-library/no-node-access' rule to allow direct DOM node access in tests.

frontend/.gitignore.general_idea: Add storybook log files to the gitignore to prevent them from being tracked in version control.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Convert Storybook configuration from CommonJS (module.exports) to ES Modules (export default) to align with modern tooling standards.
Update glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs files and remove deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add the new @storybook/addon-onboarding addon for improved developer experience.
Add @chromatic-com/storybook addon for visual testing integration.
Add storybook-addon-remix-react-router to support React Router v6+ in stories.
Add @storybook/addon-queryparams to manage query parameters in stories.
Explicitly define the framework as @storybook/react-webpack5, replacing implicit configuration.
Configure staticDirs to serve public assets, a requirement for newer Storybook versions.
Remove custom webpack plugin for failing on warnings, likely due to incompatibility or deprecation in new webpack/storybook setup.

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Integrate msw-storybook-addon to enable API mocking in Storybook stories.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: import { initialize, mswLoader } from 'msw-storybook-addon'; initialize(); loaders: [mswLoader]

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add react-toastify to provide visual feedback for navigation events in Storybook.
Implement a decorator that shows a toast notification when navigation occurs in Storybook.
frontend/.storybook/preview.js.human_impl: useEffect(() => { if (location.pathname !== '/') toast('Would navigate to: ' + location.pathname); }, [location]);

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Allow stories to opt-out of the MemoryRouter wrapper via a suppressMemoryRouter argument.
Update Storybook preview parameters to use the modern controls matchers syntax.
Refactor the preview configuration to use the default export pattern for Storybook 8 compatibility.

frontend/README.md.general_idea: Replace generic Create React App boilerplate documentation with project-specific commands and directory structure explanations.
frontend/README.md.human_impl: Replaced '# Getting Started with Create React App' and 'Available Scripts' with custom tables for 'Commands' and 'Directory structures'.

frontend/README.md.general_idea: Remove outdated links to external Create React App documentation that are no longer relevant or necessary.
frontend/README.md.human_impl: Deleted sections linking to 'Code Splitting', 'Analyzing the Bundle Size', 'Making a Progressive Web App', 'Advanced Configuration', 'Deployment', and 'npm run build fails to minify'.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Migrate package-lock.json from version 1 to version 3 to align with modern npm standards and the new dependency resolution algorithm.
Update the project name and version in the lockfile to reflect the current state of the frontend application.
Explicitly pin the Node.js engine version to v20.17.0 to ensure consistent runtime behavior across environments.
Upgrade React and ReactDOM to version 18 to utilize modern concurrent features and improved performance.
Upgrade Storybook and its associated addons to version 8 to support the latest UI development workflows and compatibility with React 18.
Upgrade @testing-library/react to version 16 to ensure compatibility with React 18 and modern testing patterns.
Upgrade axios to version 1.7.4 to benefit from security patches and new features in the HTTP client.
Upgrade Bootstrap to version 5.3.3 to access the latest CSS framework improvements and bug fixes.
Upgrade react-router-dom to version 6.26.1 to ensure compatibility with the latest React Router features.
Ensure react-scripts is pinned to 5.0.1, maintaining the Create React App build toolchain.
Add Mock Service Worker (msw) and its storybook addon to enable API mocking in tests and stories.
Add react-query to manage server state and data fetching in the React application.
Add recharts to enable data visualization and charting capabilities in the frontend.
Add react-hook-form to simplify form handling and validation in React components.
Add react-table to provide headless UI for building flexible and performant tables.
Add react-toastify to implement toast notifications for user feedback.
Add graphql dependency to support GraphQL query parsing and execution.
Upgrade ESLint and related plugins to modern versions to enforce updated coding standards.
Add Prettier to enforce consistent code formatting across the project.
Upgrade Babel core and plugins to version 7.25+ to support modern JavaScript syntax and optimizations.
Upgrade Webpack to version 5.93.0 to leverage improved bundling performance and features.
Add Chromatic integration for visual regression testing of Storybook stories.
Add Stryker Mutator for mutation testing to improve test quality.
Add nyc for code coverage reporting in the test suite.
Add axios-mock-adapter to facilitate mocking of HTTP requests in tests.
Add jest-mock-console to simplify mocking of console methods in Jest tests.
Add typescript-eslint to support linting for TypeScript files if used in the project.
Add react-inspector to assist with debugging and inspecting React components.
Add react18-json-view to display JSON data in a user-friendly format.
Add web-vitals to measure and report performance metrics of the web application.
Add storybook-addon-remix-react-router to enable routing in Storybook stories.
Add @storybook/addon-queryparams to manage query parameters in Storybook stories.
Add prop-types to support runtime type checking for React props.
Add @babel/plugin-proposal-private-property-in-object to support private class fields in Babel.
Add globals package to define global variables for ESLint configuration.
Upgrade @babel/core and its parser to support modern JavaScript syntax and fix engine compatibility.
Replace deprecated proposal plugins with standard transform plugins and update versions.
Upgrade Storybook to version 8 to align with project modernization efforts.
frontend/package-lock.json.human_impl: Updated storybook dependencies and related plugins.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Fix react-refresh compatibility issues with newer Node.js versions.
frontend/package-lock.json.human_impl: Updated react-refresh and related webpack plugins.

frontend/package-lock.json.general_idea: Update package.json engines field to require Node.js 20+ for compatibility.

Add @bundled-es-modules/tough-cookie to provide ES module compatible cookie handling for the new stack.

Add @bcoe/v8-coverage to support updated code coverage reporting in the new test stack.
Add @babel/regjsgen to support updated regex generation in the new Babel toolchain.

Remove @mdx-js/loader and related MDX packages as they are replaced by Storybook 8's native MDX support.
Remove @pmmmwh/react-refresh-webpack-plugin as it is replaced by the new React Refresh integration in the updated build tools.
Remove @reach/router as it is deprecated and replaced by React Router in the new stack.
Remove @restart/context and @restart/hooks as they are replaced by React's built-in hooks and context.
Remove @rollup/plugin-node-resolve and @rollup/plugin-replace as they are no longer needed in the new build configuration.
Remove @npmcli/move-file as it is no longer used in the new build process.
Remove @mrmlnc/readdir-enhanced as it is no longer used in the new build process.
Remove @popperjs/core as it is replaced by a different positioning library or built-in solution.
Remove @nodelib/fs.scandir, @nodelib/fs.stat, and @nodelib/fs.walk as they are replaced by native Node.js fs methods or other libraries.
Remove @sinonjs/commons as it is no longer used in the new test stack.
Remove @istanbuljs/load-nyc-config and @istanbuljs/schema as they are replaced by newer coverage tools.

Remove @jest/console, @jest/core, @jest/environment, @jest/fake-timers, @jest/globals, @jest/reporters, @jest/source-map, @jest/test-result, @jest/test-sequencer, @jest/transform, and @jest/types as they are replaced by a newer Jest version or different test runner.
